title: The Nom Nom Show
description: In this short-lived variety show, Nom Nom improvises when his lineup of internet sensation-type folks all cancel at the last minute.
quote: I love you too, grown adult!
alt1: Hedgehog wearing a hat and playing a keyboard
alt2: Grizz the bear riding down a ramp on a skateboard, Nom Nom’s leg is tethered to the board as he realizes and screams
alt3: Nom Nom dressed as Romeo holding a bouquet of roses
alt4: Ice Bear as a magician next to an armored glass box of water with Nom Nom submerged
